title: viscum album subsp. platyspermum
intro: Viscum album subsp. platyspermum, also known as European mistletoe, is a subspecies of the Viscum album plant, a hemiparasitic shrub that grows on various tree species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Viscum album subsp. platyspermum include stimulating the immune system, reducing cancer cell proliferation, and alleviating symptoms of chronic fatigue syndrome. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into extracts, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support health and well-being.
